name: Richard Transportation Para
districts_or_customers: Unknown; appears to serve local St. Louis area paratransit/wheelchair-lift riders; no confirmed school district contracts
recent_news: No recent M&A or news found; small owner-operated paratransit business at 1247 R M Moore Ave, St. Louis. Listed under 'Richardson Transportation Para-Lift Service' on Yelp (active as of late 2025).
fit_notes: Micro-scale (~3 employees, ~$200K rev) owner-operated paratransit/wheelchair-lift service founded 1976; owner age and 50-year tenure suggest succession potential but too small for a meaningful Summit tuck-in; not a school-bus operator.

name: A & J Mobility
districts_or_customers: Retail consumers; BraunAbility-certified dealer; NMEDA QAP certified; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: A&J Mobility (parent A&J Vans Inc, founded 1975) is part of Morrie's Mobility & Finance / Morrie's Automotive Group network. Operates multiple WI/IL locations. Not a transportation operator.
fit_notes: NOT A TARGET - A&J Mobility is a wheelchair-van retail dealer (sales/service/rentals), not a student-transportation contractor. Part of Morrie's Mobility network. No school-bus operations. Disqualify from tuck-in pipeline.

name: Kids-Express School Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely Miami-Dade County Public Schools area; website listed as dadeschools.net suggests district-affiliated contracting; very small subcontractor
recent_news: FL Profit Corporation filed 12/9/2015; principal address 850 N Miami Ave, Miami FL 33136 (per Sunbiz); active. Source data lists Carlos A Lopez as owner but Sunbiz/D&B show Guillermo Gonzalez as President — discrepancy noted.
fit_notes: Micro Miami-Dade school-bus subcontractor (~4 employees, ~$240K-$357K rev, founded 2015). Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in on its own; might be a roll-up component in a FL Miami-Dade consolidation play but standalone fit is marginal.

name: E D Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: Operates in City and County of Philadelphia under PA PUC common-carrier paratransit application; serves medical/rehab appointments; no confirmed school-bus or district contracts
recent_news: PA LLC formed 1/9/2019; PA PUC motor carrier application for paratransit service in Philadelphia (PA Bulletin Vol 49 No 28, 2019). USDOT #3355551. Active.
fit_notes: Very small Philly paratransit/NEMT operator (~6 employees, founded 2019); wheelchair/medical focus rather than yellow school bus. Limited Summit fit unless Summit pursues SPED/medical-route adjacencies; not a core tuck-in candidate.

name: Wheelchair Transportation
principals: Clifton Williams (listed as Controller per ZoomInfo; Owner per source data)
employees_est: 50+ (employees + independent contractors; source row of 6 likely undercounts)
districts_or_customers: Optum/Evercare, PSTA Mobility on Demand, VA (Bay Pines and Ft. Myers), private pay; West Coast Florida service area; HQ Clearwater FL (not Sarasota — source HQ address may be a service-area listing)
recent_news: Wheelchair Transport Service (WTS) — 50+ years in operation (founded 1973). Featured in ABC Action News for drivers assisting child in highway danger. No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Long-tenured (50+ yrs) FL West Coast NEMT/wheelchair operator — adult medical transport, NOT student transportation. Outside Summit's school-bus thesis. Disqualify unless Summit explicitly expands into SPED/NEMT adjacency.
